title: Dark Green Gold Black Balloon Arch Kit with Explosion Star Balloons, 123pcs Emerald Green and Confetti Gold Balloon Garland for Birthday Anniversary Bachelorette Grad Wedding New Year Party Decoration
features: 🍀 PARTY BALLOONS KIT: The green and gold balloon garland set have 123pcs balloons, include foil gold explosion star 2pcs, gold confetti (12"6pcs), dack green (18"1pcs+10"25pcs+5"15pcs), black (18"1pcs+10"25pcs+5"15pcs), metallic gold (10"12pcs+5"15pcs), 16ft balloon strip tape (1 roll), 100pc glue dot (1 roll).

🍀 HIGH - QUALITY MATERIALS: This green and black balloon arch kit is made from 100% natural latex. Latex balloons are thick, durable and long - lasting, ensuring they stay inflated throughout your party. Each balloon has been rigorously tested to ensure that even the simplest products show excellent quality not only are very durable but also there are safe for children.

🍀 WIDE APPLICATION: Our black and emerald green gold balloon garland kit with shimmering foil stars balloons to add a touch of elegance and sparkle to your party. They are suitable for various wide scenes, such as birthday decorations, wedding anniversary safari Jungle forest party football graduation decorations.

🍀 EASY TO ASSEMBLE: Our balloon chain is a detachable design, which is convenient for you to adjust or rearrange during the process of assembling the balloon chain. You don't need any professional skills. You can use balloon chains or glue dots to quickly assemble the balloon chain according to the shape of the balloon you want. The assembly process is not only simple and fast, but also inspires your creativity and allows you to enjoy the fun of DIY decoration.

🍀 NOTICE: The color of balloon before and after inflation may not the same, the color of the balloon will be better after inflation. In addition, the color of the balloon may vary under different lights. It is recommended to inflate latex balloons to 90%. Avoid over-inflating to prevent bursting and rendering them unusable and direct sunlight, high temperature, pointed object and excessive friction.
description: These dack green black and gold confetti balloons are not only colorful, but also soft to the touch, bringing you extraordinary touch and visual enjoyment. You also can use your imagination and enjoy the fun of assembling balloons with your family and friends. Specifications: 🌟 Material: 100% Natural Latex / Foil 🌟 Size: 5inch / 10inch / 18inch 🌟 Quantity: 123 Pieces 🌟 Color: Gold Star / Black / Emerald Green / Metallic Gold / Gold Confetti 🌟 Accessories: Include the balloons decorating strip tape and glue dots, which can be designed the balloon garland or balloon arch by yourself. Inflatable: Both air and helium supported. Perfect for creating a balloon arch, balloon garland, or balloon bouquet. You can mix and match the colors to create a unique and personalized look that matches your event's theme. How to make a balloon garland? 💗 Step 1 💗 Inflate balloons of different sizes to 90% and tie them tightly. 💗 Step 2 💗 Place the end of the inflated balloon into the small hole of the arch bar to ensure it does not come out. 💗 Step 3 💗 Use tape or string to secure the finished balloon garland into the perfect shape you want. 💗 Step 4 💗 If you feel the balloon arch is not full and perfect enough, you can use glue dots to stick more balloons on it. Please Note ! ⚠ If you are allergic to latex, please avoid using latex balloons. ⚠ For children, latex balloons should be used under adult supervision. ⚠ Can be filled with helium or air. If you want the balloon to rise, you can fill it with nitrogen. ⚠ For balloons below 5 inches, recommended to use a manual pump. Above 5 inches can use an electric pump, which is convenient and quick.
